response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his seniority (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceeds the entry-level scope, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and potential disengagement. His German language skill is basic, conflicting with high on-site presence needs in Berlin. His focus on niche tech (DLang, custom tooling) and lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience are notable gaps.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with real-world scalability
Strong DevOps and infrastructure exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; risk of poor retention or mismatched expectations
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy domain experience
